basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 23 June 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E / M.Tech in Mechanical, Chemical Engineering, Energy Engineering, or related disciplines or MSc in Physics/Chemistry/Applied Physics
qualification.details: M.E / M.Tech in Mechanical, Chemical Engineering, Energy Engineering, or related disciplines or MSc in Physics/Chemistry/Applied Physics

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BITS Pilani Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BITS Pilani Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E / M.Tech in Mechanical, Chemical Engineering, Energy Engineering, or related disciplines, or an MSc in Physics/Chemistry/Applied Physics to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for the Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Fellow recruitment involves an initial CV shortlisting followed by an online interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Fellow position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Research Fellow recruitment at BITS Pilani.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the BITS Pilani Research Fellow job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Fellow position at Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is BITS Pilani located?
faq.answer: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani is located in Pilani, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply after the last date?
faq.answer: Applications submitted after the last date of 15th July 2026 will not be considered. It is advised to apply well in advance.
